projectDescription: A Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 microservices ecosystem featuring service discovery, JWT authentication, event-driven messaging (RabbitMQ/Kafka), distributed tracing (Zipkin), and centralized logging (ELK stack), deployable via Docker Compose.
keyFeatures: Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 multi-module Maven project
Centralized configuration via Spring Cloud Config Server
JWT authentication (HS384) with BCrypt password hashing
Spring Cloud Gateway as OAuth2 Resource Server
Event-driven messaging with RabbitMQ and Apache Kafka (switchable via Spring Profiles)
Distributed tracing with Micrometer Tracing + Zipkin
Centralized log aggregation with ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana)
Full Docker Compose deployment with health checks and profiles
publicApiSurface: POST /auth/login — Authenticate and receive a JWT token
GET /api/inventory/products — List all products (requires Bearer token)
GET /api/inventory/products/{id} — Get a product by ID (requires Bearer token)
POST /api/inventory/products — Create a product (requires Bearer token)
GET /actuator/health — Health check for each service
GET http://localhost:8761 — Eureka service registry dashboard
GET http://localhost:9411 — Zipkin distributed tracing UI
GET http://localhost:5601 — Kibana log visualization UI
